response.global_analysis: 1. Reference Lyrics Match: The vocal music segment aligns closely with 'Fukashigi no Karte' lyrics, which are utilized for timing and transcription. 2. Manual Segment: The conversational segment (02:43.500 to end) was fully transcribed and translated manually based on native audio comprehension. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timings are strictly tied to vocal waveforms, using truncation and instantaneous transitions where appropriate to prevent delays. No CC tags or visual-only subtitles are included since all spoken dialogue has clear audio.

subtitles.original: ...カルテ
subtitles.english: ...chart...

subtitles.original: 自意識 溢れ出して
subtitles.english: ...and an overflowing self-consciousness.

subtitles.original: 鼓動 世界像
subtitles.english: Beating, world image...

subtitles.original: いつも噛み合わないの
subtitles.english: It's always a bit off,

subtitles.original: 痛くて
subtitles.english: it hurts.

subtitles.original: 毎夜 ねがいごと
subtitles.english: Every night I wish,

subtitles.original: なんにも疑わないで
subtitles.english: I don't want to doubt anything,

subtitles.original: 混ざり融け合いたい
subtitles.english: and I want to melt together.

subtitles.original: たわいない 判らない 理由 存在
subtitles.english: Silly, I don't know, reasoning, existing...

subtitles.original: あなたと残す後悔
subtitles.english: Regrets left with you.

subtitles.original: 誰も読めないカルテ
subtitles.english: A chart that no one can read,

subtitles.original: 不愉快 繰り返して
subtitles.english: repeating the unpleasantness.

subtitles.original: 正しい夢は
subtitles.english: Is a correct dream,

subtitles.original: かなしい声は
subtitles.english: a sad voice,

subtitles.original: 美しい? 疑わしい? 羨ましい?
subtitles.english: beautiful? Doubtful? Enviable?

subtitles.original: ねえ、どれ?
subtitles.english: Hey, which one?

subtitles.original: 語れない眠れないトロイメライ
subtitles.english: I can't talk, I can't sleep, Traumerei,

subtitles.original: あなたの見てる正体
subtitles.english: the true identity you are seeing.

subtitles.original: 誰も読めないカルテ
subtitles.english: A chart that no one can read.

subtitles.original: 不可思議 知りたいだけ
subtitles.english: I just want to know the wonder.

subtitles.original: 終わらないことはない トロイメライ
subtitles.english: There is nothing that doesn't end, Traumerei,

subtitles.original: あなたと跨ぐ境界
subtitles.english: the boundary I cross with you.

subtitles.original: 誰も読めないカルテ
subtitles.english: A chart that no one can read.

subtitles.original: 思春期 疵口 胸のうち
subtitles.english: Adolescence, wounds, inside my chest...

subtitles.original: 不可思議 知りたいだけ
subtitles.english: I just want to know the wonder.

subtitles.original: はい！ということで！
subtitles.english: Yes! And with that!

subtitles.original: にじさんじから町田ちまさんに来ていただきましたー！
subtitles.english: From Nijisanji, we have Machita Chima-san here with us!

subtitles.original: おまえらの皆さん、こんばんは！上から読んでも下から読んでも町田ちまです！
subtitles.english: Good evening to all of Omaera! Whether you read it forward or backward, I'm Machita Chima!

subtitles.original: わーい！ちまさんにも「おまえら」が浸透してる！
subtitles.english: Yay! "Omaera" has reached Chima-san as well!

subtitles.original: もちろん知っています！
subtitles.english: Of course I know!

subtitles.original: 知ってるんですか？
subtitles.english: You knew?!

subtitles.original: お誕生日おめでとうございます！
subtitles.english: Happy birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: めでたいめでたい
subtitles.english: Congratulations, congratulations!

subtitles.original: 何ですか、その動きは？
subtitles.english: What is that movement?

subtitles.original: あ、これやっちゃうんです、これ
subtitles.english: Ah, I just end up doing this.

subtitles.original: あ、やっちゃう...癖なんですか？
subtitles.english: Ah, you do... Is it a habit?

subtitles.original: 癖なんです
subtitles.english: It's a habit.

subtitles.original: それ、ちょっとリハーサルの時もやってて...
subtitles.english: You were doing that during the rehearsal too...

subtitles.original: やめて、ばらすのやめてください！
subtitles.english: Stop, please don't expose me!

subtitles.original: 変な動きが出るんですね
subtitles.english: So you make weird movements, I see.

subtitles.original: うん、でも今日はちょっと大人しくね、お話します
subtitles.english: Yeah, but today I'll talk a bit more calmly.

subtitles.original: なるほど、ちょっと出てましたけど、全然出してもらっても大丈夫ですからね
subtitles.english: I see. It slipped out a bit, but it's totally fine to show it!

subtitles.original: あの、そういえば、ちまさんとはですね、先日、一緒に「空想列車」という楽曲の「歌ってみた」をコラボさせていただきまして...
subtitles.english: Um, by the way, with Chima-san, we recently collaborated on a cover of the song "Kuusou Ressha"...

subtitles.original: せていただきました！
subtitles.english: We did!

subtitles.original: 本当にありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: こちらこそ、お誘いいただいて本当に嬉しかった！
subtitles.english: Likewise, I was so happy you invited me!

subtitles.original: そうですか？やったー！
subtitles.english: Really? Yay!

subtitles.original: もう、ちまさんの透明な歌声に絶対に似合うだろうなと思って...
subtitles.english: I thought it would absolutely suit Chima-san's clear singing voice...

subtitles.original: 「空想列車」もそうだし、今回の「不可思議のカルテ」も絶対に似合うだろうなと思って選曲させていただきました
subtitles.english: so I chose both "Kuusou Ressha" and this time's "Fukashigi no Karte."

subtitles.original: 嬉しい！
subtitles.english: I'm so happy!

subtitles.original: 一緒に歌えてとっても嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: I'm so happy we could sing together!

subtitles.original: 私も幸せです！
subtitles.english: I'm happy too!

subtitles.original: でも、からで、なんか一個気になってることがあって...
subtitles.english: But, there's one thing I've been wondering about...

subtitles.original: 何でしょう？
subtitles.english: What is it?

subtitles.original: 空想列車のコメント欄に、なんか、「化け物」って書いてあったんですけど、ちまさんのこと。
subtitles.english: In the comment section of "Kuusou Ressha," someone wrote "monster" about Chima-san.

subtitles.original: うん
subtitles.english: Yes.

subtitles.original: それは何なんですか？
subtitles.english: What's up with that?

subtitles.original: 多分、別人？あの、違う人のことを言ってるのかなって思うので、忘れてください。
subtitles.english: Maybe it's another person? I think they're talking about someone else, so please forget it.

subtitles.original: わかりました！そんな、こんな、こんな綺麗な、お姉さん...
subtitles.english: Understood! There's no way such a beautiful lady...

subtitles.original: そうよ、こんな、もうね...
subtitles.english: Right, someone like this...

subtitles.original: 化け物なわけないですよね、今のコメントでも「化け物」って書いてあったけど、ちょっと見間違えてますよね、これ。
subtitles.english: There's no way she's a monster. Though "monster" was written in the comments just now, they must be mistaken.

subtitles.original: 見間違えたよね、我々二人とも清楚だもんね。
subtitles.english: They must have made a mistake. We are both pure and wholesome, after all.

subtitles.original: もちろん！からでも清楚ですよ、そりゃあもう！
subtitles.english: Of course! Kanade is pure too, absolutely!

subtitles.original: はい！
subtitles.english: Yes!

subtitles.original: ということで、ちまさん、一緒に歌えてとっても嬉しかったかったです！
subtitles.english: So, Chima-san, I was so happy to sing with you!

subtitles.original: こちらこそ！嬉しかった！
subtitles.english: Me too! I was so happy!

subtitles.original: 嬉しかったです。よかったらまた、機会があったらまた、一緒に歌わせてください！
subtitles.english: I was so happy. If you'd like, and if there's another opportunity, please let us sing together again!

subtitles.original: いつでも歌いましょう！
subtitles.english: Let's sing anytime!

subtitles.original: やったー！言質取りました！
subtitles.english: Yay! I got you on record!

subtitles.original: やったやった！嬉しい。
subtitles.english: Yay, yay! I'm happy.

subtitles.original: じゃあ、この後も引き続き頑張ってください！
subtitles.english: Well then, please keep doing your best for the rest of the show!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: 応援してます！
subtitles.english: I'm cheering for you!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！まったねー！
subtitles.english: Thank you! See you later!

subtitles.original: またねー！
subtitles.english: See you!
